title: Waifu Gacha
description: A lightweight Danbooru-backed anime image/card gacha. The tool owns draw state, score-band rarity, pity counters, collection, and leaderboard; the model wraps the result.
notes: Use for playful anime/card gacha requests such as 抽卡, 抽老婆, 今日老婆, 十连, or 查看图鉴.

Draw/daily/ten_pull returns Safebooru/Danbooru posts as the card images. The feature tool downloads result media, writes the local archive, and posts to the configured Telegram archive channel before returning. Do not use generated_gallery or image_generate for gacha art.
The gacha first rolls rarity, then searches 1girl plus that rarity's score band. Rarity is not re-judged from the returned post.
Default rates are N 40%, R 50%, SR 8%, SSR 1.67%, UR 0.33%; UR has a 300-draw hard pity.
The rates in this manifest are written as percentages; UR 0.33 means 0.33%, not probability 0.33.
Score bands are N 20-30, R 31-50, SR 51-100, SSR 101-299, UR 300+.

One user gacha request is capped at 10 draws. If the model repeats the same ten-pull/multi-draw tool request shortly after, the tool returns a compact duplicate marker with suppressFinalReply and no resultImages/results.
Image URLs prefer the original file when available; sample/preview URLs are retained as fallback metadata.

Normal gacha cache/channel archival is script-owned inside feature_action. Use gacha_archive only for manual repair/backfill with existing bot-local media. Pass resultImages metadata such as pageUrl, sourceUrl, primaryTags, archiveTags, characterTags, copyrightTags, artistTags, and tagString through unchanged when doing manual repair; the archive tool owns Telegram caption and #hashtag formatting.

Ten-pull and multi-draw results expose resultImages for up to 10 images so the model can download, inspect, and send them as one reply/album when possible. If hiding is needed, use Telegram native spoiler; do not pixel-censor the original.
Gacha formatting is script-owned: use replyText as the factual output body and do not rewrite factual results.
Preserve card name, rarity, affinity, primary tags, new/duplicate state, Danbooru post id/page URL, score, and collection counts exactly.

actions.description: Draw one Danbooru-backed anime image/card for one Telegram user.
Draw ten cards with at least one SR-or-better result.
Draw or read today's deterministic waifu/card for one user.
Read one user's compact waifu/card gacha profile, pity counters, rarity counts, and recent draws.
Read aggregate gacha lab statistics for the group/state store.
